clip_text: Stop chasing viral. Start serving one person. I make every episode for Sarah. Not for the algorithm.

caption_variants.label: Bold White + Black Outline
caption_variants.description: Classic podcast caption — white text, heavy black outline. Max readability on any background.
caption_variants.use_case: Universal. Works on TikTok, Reels, Shorts, LinkedIn.

caption_variants.label: Yellow Word Highlight
caption_variants.description: Key word highlighted in yellow on each line. High engagement on TikTok.
caption_variants.use_case: TikTok, Reels. Drama, comedy, education niches.

caption_variants.label: Dark Pill Background
caption_variants.description: Text inside semi-transparent rounded pill. Clean, modern. LinkedIn/professional.
caption_variants.use_case: LinkedIn, YouTube Shorts. Professional, business, coaching niches.

caption_variants.label: Kinetic Single Word
caption_variants.description: One word at a time, large, centered. Max impact. Highly viral on TikTok.
caption_variants.use_case: TikTok, Reels. Comedy, fitness, motivation niches.

caption_variants.label: Brand Color Accent
caption_variants.description: White text with accent line in brand color. Professional and distinctive.
caption_variants.use_case: LinkedIn, YouTube Shorts. Founder, B2B, coach niches.

thumbnail_variants.label: Bold Text on Gradient Background
thumbnail_variants.description: Full-bleed dark gradient, large white headline, creator name small at bottom.
thumbnail_variants.use_case: Business, founder, education niches. LinkedIn + YT Shorts.

thumbnail_variants.label: Split: Face Left + Text Right
thumbnail_variants.description: Left half: creator face (placeholder). Right half: hook text. Classic YouTube thumbnail.
thumbnail_variants.use_case: Any niche. Highest CTR template on YouTube Shorts.

thumbnail_variants.label: Quote Card
thumbnail_variants.description: Large pull quote, attribution below, minimal design. Shareable as image.
thumbnail_variants.use_case: LinkedIn, Twitter/X. Text-heavy content, coaching, thought leadership.

thumbnail_variants.label: TikTok Loud
thumbnail_variants.description: Bright color block, oversized emoji, short hook in caps. Max scroll-stop.
thumbnail_variants.use_case: TikTok, Reels. Comedy, fitness, lifestyle niches.

hook_variants.label: Question Hook
hook_variants.description: Opens with a question that creates curiosity gap. Strong for educational/business content.
hook_variants.example: Why do podcasters who post LESS grow FASTER?

hook_variants.label: Number Hook
hook_variants.description: Number hooks set expectations and promise concrete value. High CTR on all platforms.
hook_variants.example: 3 things that tripled my downloads in 90 days

hook_variants.label: Story/Confession Hook
hook_variants.description: Personal story creates instant relatability. Best conversion for coaching/founder niches.
hook_variants.example: I posted every day for 6 months. My numbers barely moved.

hook_variants.label: Statistic/Result Hook
hook_variants.description: Proof-first hook. Best for skeptical audiences. High trust signal.
hook_variants.example: Downloads tripled in 90 days. Here's exactly what changed.

hook_variants.label: Contrarian Hook
hook_variants.description: Pattern-interrupt. Stops scroll immediately. Works best for opinionated founders/coaches.
hook_variants.example: Stop trying to go viral. Start serving ONE person.
